learn.core_idea: Throughput captures completed work over time and can conflict with fairness and latency goals.
mechanism_steps: Validate fairness floor is still acceptable.
learn.worked_example: Policies with fewer switches can improve throughput for CPU-heavy workloads but harm response.
common_mistakes: Maximizing one metric and ignoring others.
Reading throughput without checking completed count.
Assuming fairness and throughput always align.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can verify completion and fairness together.
I can justify policy choice from data.
